properties.name: East Coast Region
properties.boundary_basis: Existing political boundaries represented by U.S. Census state and district boundaries
properties.notes: Umbrella region following the generally understood East Coast of the United States: Atlantic-bordering states CT, DE, FL, GA, ME, MD, MA, NH, NJ, NY, NC, RI, SC, and VA, plus PA, VT, WV, and DC. This intentionally excludes OH, KY, and TN.
properties.coordination_notes: This region follows an established political or public administrative boundary rather than a New England Mesh-defined boundary.
properties.source: U.S. Census Bureau 2024 cartographic boundary files
